trigger_keywords: metodo principal para combatir la filoxera

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Phylloxera attacks and damages the roots of susceptible Vitis vinifera vines.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: The desired vinifera variety is grafted onto resistant American-vine rootstock that tolerates or limits root damage from the insect.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The scion can produce the intended grapes while the resistant roots provide the principal long-term defence against phylloxera.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The scion can produce the intended grapes while the resistant roots provide the principal long-term defence against phylloxera.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
